---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in the Inkog CLI
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of what's going wrong.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `inkog ...`
2. ...

## Command and Output

```bash
# The exact command you ran
$ inkog -path ./my-agent -policy balanced
```

```
# The output you got (paste full output if helpful)
```

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Environment

- **Inkog version:** (run `inkog -version`)
- **OS:** (e.g. macOS 14.5, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11)
- **Install method:** (Homebrew / `go install` / npx / binary / GitHub Action)
- **Framework being scanned:** (LangChain, CrewAI, n8n, custom, etc.)
- **Repository size:** (rough file count, if relevant)

## Additional Context

- Relevant file(s) being scanned, if shareable
- A minimal reproduction repo if you can put one together
- Any other context (logs, screenshots, network conditions)

## Privacy Note

Don't paste real API keys, credentials, or customer data — redact them first. If the bug only reproduces against confidential code, email `support@inkog.io` instead.
